title: ctenopteris torulosa
intro: Ctenopteris torulosa, also known as the New Zealand fan fern, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris torulosa are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
